name: @keyma/runtime-cpp
description: C++23 header-only runtime consumed by Keyma-generated C++. Ships the umbrella include/keyma/runtime.hpp (keyma::Value, schema metadata, intrinsics, from_value<T>/to_value<T> + value_traits<T>, the JSON + binary wire codecs) plus the @Service RPC surface: a concrete coroutine async core (keyma::task / scheduler / event_loop), keyma::result/error, and the transport / service / client / service_host seam.
